name: Pastry Pockets for Creole Style Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. Cut in the vegetable shortening using pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add egg and milk to the dry ingredients; mix until dough forms.
4. Divide dough into 8 equal pieces (about the size of an egg).
5. Roll out each piece of dough into a circle that is approximately 6 inches in diameter.
6. Set aside to cool slightly before using for your Creole style pies.
